title: [The immunology-hematology-transfusion department].
author_string: Goldman, M, Andrien, M, Delville, J P, Dupont, E, Kornreich, A et al.
abstract: New immunotherapies derived from biotechnology offer fascinating perspectives in different fields of medicine including anti-infectious vaccines, cancer, organ transplantation and autoimmune diseases. In this paper, we illustrate how the Department of Immunology can contribute to the development of these new treatments within a academic hospital such as the Erasme Hospital at the Université Libre de Bruxelles.
